rationale: The citing paper is a conceptual guide for marketing policy models in pricing/promotion and explicitly discusses VAR/VECM diagnostics for policy credibility, while the cited paper is a detailed VAR/impulse-response study of long-term price-promotion effects on incidence/choice/quantity. That topic-and-method alignment makes this plausibly more than a perfunctory background mention, even though the matched evidence is DOI-only without local citation text.
